title: Interface and guidance voice languages are selected independently
purpose: Allow a Chinese interface with English spoken guidance while preserving the Japanese physical sign target.

limitations: This does not verify installed system voices or final pronunciation quality.

guidance.japanese_sign_text: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

ja-JP.display_text: 左側を進み、B 湾岸線・横浜方面へ
ja-JP.spoken_text: B 湾岸線、横浜方面へ
ja-JP.preserved_japanese_sign_text: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

zh-Hans.display_text: 保持左侧，跟随 B 湾岸线・横滨方向
zh-Hans.spoken_text: 保持左侧，跟随 B 湾岸线，横滨方向
zh-Hans.preserved_japanese_sign_text: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

en.display_text: Keep left for Route B toward Yokohama
en.spoken_text: Keep left for Route B toward Yokohama
en.preserved_japanese_sign_text: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

then.subject: presentation.kernel.interface_locale
then.rationale: Interface selection controls displayed explanatory text.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.phone.localized_display_text
then.expected: 保持左侧，跟随 B 湾岸线・横滨方向
then.rationale: The phone uses the selected interface language.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.voice_locale
then.rationale: Voice language changes independently from the interface.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.voice.spoken_text
then.expected: Keep left for Route B toward Yokohama
then.rationale: The voice adapter receives the reviewed English spoken form.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.phone.japanese_sign_text
then.expected: B 湾岸線・横浜方面
then.rationale: Neither language setting can replace the physical sign target.
